shots.caption: 71 gateways, one abstraction
shots.narration: One abstraction sits behind seventy-one payment gateways, and this dashboard tracks every one of them live.

shots.caption: Every gateway, an honest status
shots.narration: Every provider carries its real status — sandbox-ready, mock mode, or KYC-gated — nothing here is faked.

shots.caption: Journaled before the SDK opens
shots.narration: Tap a gateway and the run begins — the payment is journaled to Room before the SDK even opens.

shots.caption: Client hints; server verifies
shots.narration: The client reports success, but that's only a hint — the timeline won't settle until the server verifies it.

shots.caption: Same engine, everyday checkout
shots.narration: The everyday checkout runs through that same orchestrator, just wrapped in a cart.

shots.caption: A filterable transaction journal
shots.narration: Every transaction lands in that same Room journal, filterable by status — success, failed, refunded, all streamed live.

shots.caption: Real logos, honest fallbacks
shots.narration: Real logos where they're licensed, a generated monogram everywhere else — seventy-one gateways, zero broken badges.

shots.caption: Native on iOS too
shots.narration: And it isn't Android-only — the same contract, the same guarantees, running natively on iOS as well.
